name: Meridian Deep-Sea Observatory
site_goal: Present a coastal oceanographic observatory and research institute as a working scientific organization with transparent ongoing research, live sensor data, and an accessible publications and expeditions record for both expert and public audiences.

motif.section_headers: Thin teal hairline above, dashed teal line below each section header (sonar-trace recall)
motif.live_data: Small rust-colored circles for live/active markers with pulse animation
motif.figure_captions: Italic Crimson Pro with bold 'Fig.' grotesk label in rust

layout.navigation: Left sidebar nav grouped by Observatory, Disciplines, Shared Facilities; persistent breadcrumb above content
layout.mobile: Sidebar collapses to slide-in panel via top-bar menu button; buoy strip becomes horizontally scrollable; map and timeline stack with scrubber pinned below map

pages.title: Overview
pages.layout: Director hero quote, live buoy strip, three featured research threads, currently-at-sea and seminars rail, news rail

pages.title: Research & Labs
pages.layout: Discipline-grouped bands (5 disciplines + shared facilities) with two-column lab lists

pages.title: People
pages.layout: Filter chips above 3-column card grids for PIs, Scientists, Postdocs/Grads, Emeritus; ORCID badges on PI cards

pages.title: Dr. Yuki Okafor
pages.layout: Two-column profile: portrait/identifiers/education on left; bio/projects/publications/field-sites/teaching on right

pages.title: Publications
pages.layout: Search bar + faceted filter rail + reverse-chronological citation list with expandable abstracts and bulk export controls

pages.title: Expeditions
pages.layout: Regional cruise-track map (SVG), sortable expedition table, detail drawer with science party, scrubber, and daily-log timeline

pages.title: Data & Tools
pages.layout: Live buoy strip, catalog filter bar, dataset card list with inline sparkline/spectrogram previews, spectrogram audio player; access guidance and network status panel

pages.title: Newsroom
pages.layout: Lead feature, two-column secondary stories, chronological archive list, press-contacts and media-kit sidebar, field-dispatches feed

pages.title: Careers
pages.layout: Category navigation, deadline-prominent job cards, fellowships section, culture/benefits/DEI bands

interactions_implemented: Mobile slide-in sidebar from top-bar menu button
Sidebar discipline groups collapsible via section toggles
Live buoy strip with simulated tick updates (values + UTC timestamp) on home and data pages
Publication search filter (live text filter) and 'show only with open data' toggle
Publication actions: BibTeX, RIS, Copy DOI, linked dataset
People page filter chips by role and discipline
Expedition page with cruise-track SVG map, status pills, detail drawer with daily-log timeline and 62% timeline scrubber
Dataset cards with sparkline and bathymetric/spectrogram previews; bioacoustics spectrogram player with play/pause toggle
Section motif (sonar-trace hairline + dashed line) consistently applied

content_model_coverage.Lab/Group: research.html — 17 labs across 5 disciplines + 4 shared facilities, each with PI, focus statement, instruments
content_model_coverage.Person: people.html / person.html — directory cards and full PI profile (Dr. Yuki Okafor) with bio, education, ORCID, current projects, selected pubs, field-site map, teaching
content_model_coverage.Publication: publications.html — 9 sample citations with DOI, authors, year, journal, abstract, open-data tag, linked dataset, BibTeX/RIS actions
content_model_coverage.Expedition: expeditions.html — 9 cruises (3 at sea, 3 planned, 3 returned) with vessel, region, dates, status; one expanded with science party and daily log
content_model_coverage.Dataset: data.html — 6 datasets covering time series, profile, imagery, and acoustic types with sensors, license, and download formats
content_model_coverage.Sensor station: Home and data pages — buoy strip with station id, depth, variables, last reading timestamp
content_model_coverage.News story: newsroom.html — lead feature, two secondaries, 10-entry archive, field dispatch rail

framework: vanilla HTML + CSS + small vanilla JS (no build, no external frameworks); Google Fonts via <link> only
